radius.$description: dimension used by the dialog component for radius.

padding.$description: dimension used by the dialog component for padding.

gap.$description: dimension used by the dialog component for gap.

min-width.$description: dimension used by the dialog component for min width.

max-width.$description: dimension used by the dialog component for max width.

bg.$description: color used by the dialog component for background.

fg.$description: color used by the dialog component for foreground.

border.$description: border used by the dialog component for border.

shadow.$description: shadow used by the dialog component for dialog shadow.

backdrop-bg.$description: color used by the dialog component for backdrop background.

font-size.$description: dimension used by the dialog component for heading font size.

font-weight.$description: font weight used by the dialog component for heading font weight.

line-height.$description: dimension used by the dialog component for heading line height.

color.$description: color used by the dialog component for focus ring color.

width.$description: dimension used by the dialog component for focus ring width.

offset.$description: dimension used by the dialog component for focus ring offset.

duration.$description: duration used by the dialog component for dialog motion duration.

easing.$description: easing curve used by the dialog component for dialog motion easing.
